narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है, जिसमें आर्थिक प्रतिबंध भी शामिल हैं। इन वजहों से रूस की हालत खस्ता हुई है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text explicitly links Russia's 'खस्ता' (deteriorated) condition to Western sanctions, framing the sanctions as the cause of Russia's decline. This highlights adverse outcomes for Russia, which is portrayed as a consequence of Western actions, fitting the narrative of predicting or reporting negative impacts on a nation due to Western policies.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: इस दौरान रूस पश्चिमी देशों के कई तरह के प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The phrase 'प्रतिबंध झेल रहा है' (is bearing/suffering sanctions) portrays Russia as enduring or suffering from Western punitive measures. This language evokes sympathy by presenting Russia as a target of external pressure, aligning with the narrative of Russia being unfairly targeted or victimized.
